## Description

`Current Behavior:`  
Practice Admin Page: [https://admin.revenuewell.com/customer/customerdetails/2258](<https://admin.revenuewell.com/customer/customerdetails/2258>)  
Practice SF: [https://revenuewell.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Account/0013600001EUFUxAAP/view](<https://revenuewell.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Account/0013600001EUFUxAAP/view>)  
DSO Link: [https://revenuewell.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Account/0013600001EUDOeAAP/view](<https://revenuewell.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Account/0013600001EUDOeAAP/view>)

On the "Portal Credentials" page there is a link that shows as "View all 46 portal logins →," but when the customer clicks on it, it does nothing  
I saw the same behavior when logging into the KayN portal directly and trying the same thing  
I saw 403 forbidden errors in the console - video attached

`Request:`  
Is this the intended functionality?  
If not, what is the customer supposed to be able to see?
